metadata.source: Official Juniper/HPE Juniper product and datasheet pages
metadata.format: matcher-compatible product catalog aligned with fortinet_scraped.json and vertiv_scraped.json
metadata.notes: Covers active Juniper routing, switching, firewall, wireless, SD-WAN, and management product families used for RFP reference matching. Datasheet URLs point to official Juniper/HPE Juniper datasheet pages where available.
